Class ClanWarpService

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.service.ClanWarpService
public final class ClanWarpService extends Object
Business logic for clan warps and their per-warp access.

A warp is either public (any clan member may use it) or restricted (only the leader, holders of ClanPermission.MANAGE_WARP, and explicitly granted members may use it). Warps are not cached; reads hit the database directly.

  • Constructor Details

    • ClanWarpService

      public ClanWarpService(IClanWarpRepository warpRepository, int maxWarpsPerClan, org.bukkit.plugin.java.JavaPlugin plugin)
      Parameters:
      warpRepository - persistence layer for warps and access
      maxWarpsPerClan - the maximum number of warps a single clan may own
      plugin - the owning plugin, used for scheduler hops when firing events

  • Method Details

    • setMaxWarpsPerClan

      public void setMaxWarpsPerClan(int max)
      Updates the maximum warps-per-clan limit. Called after a config reload.
      Parameters:
      max - the new limit

    • getMaxWarpsPerClan

      public int getMaxWarpsPerClan()
      Returns:
      the maximum number of warps a single clan may own

    • saveWarp

      public CompletableFuture<Void> saveWarp(UUID clanId, String name, org.bukkit.Location location, String iconName, String description)
      Creates a new warp, or updates the location, icon, and description of an existing one. A new warp is public and counts against the per-clan limit; updating an existing warp does not change its restriction state and is not subject to the limit.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name (1-32 chars: letters, digits, hyphen, underscore)
      location - the destination; its world must be loaded
      iconName - the Material name for the GUI icon
      description - a short description (max 256 chars)
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the warp is persisted
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the name, icon, or description is invalid
      IllegalStateException - if creating a new warp would exceed the per-clan limit

    • removeWarp

      public CompletableFuture<Boolean> removeWarp(UUID clanId, String name)
      Removes a warp and its access list.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      Returns:
      a future that is true if a warp was removed, false if none existed

    • getWarp

      public CompletableFuture<Optional<ClanWarpModel>> getWarp(UUID clanId, String name)
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      Returns:
      a future of the warp, or empty if none exists

    • listWarps

      public CompletableFuture<List<ClanWarpModel>> listWarps(UUID clanId)
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      Returns:
      a future of all the clan's warps, ordered by name

    • setRestricted

      public CompletableFuture<Void> setRestricted(UUID clanId, String name, boolean restricted)
      Sets whether a warp is restricted to its access list.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      restricted - the new restriction state
      Returns:
      a future that completes when the change is persisted

    • grantAccess

      public CompletableFuture<Void> grantAccess(UUID clanId, String name, UUID playerId)
      Grants a member access to a warp.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      playerId - the member to grant
      Returns:
      a future that completes when access is granted

    • revokeAccess

      public CompletableFuture<Void> revokeAccess(UUID clanId, String name, UUID playerId)
      Revokes a member's access to a warp.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      playerId - the member to revoke
      Returns:
      a future that completes when access is revoked

    • listAccess

      public CompletableFuture<List<UUID>> listAccess(UUID clanId, String name)
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      name - the warp name
      Returns:
      a future of the UUIDs of all members explicitly granted access

    • canUse

      public CompletableFuture<Boolean> canUse(Clan clan, UUID player, ClanWarpModel warp)
      Determines whether a member may teleport to a warp. Public warps are usable by any member; restricted warps require the leader, ClanPermission.MANAGE_WARP, or an explicit access grant.
      Parameters:
      clan - the member's clan
      player - the member to test
      warp - the warp to test
      Returns:
      a future that is true if the member may use the warp

    • accessibleWarps

      public CompletableFuture<Set<String>> accessibleWarps(UUID clanId, UUID playerId)
      Returns the names of every warp the member has an explicit access grant for. Used to resolve usability for a whole warp list in a single query.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan
      playerId - the member to look up
      Returns:
      a future of the set of warp names the member can access
